story:
"I mean, look, I wasn't proud of what I did, okay? But honestly, I was in a tight spot. I was in debt, you know? And I mean, it wasn't like I was stealing from some old lady or something. I forged some checks, alright? I didn't think it was a big deal at the time.

I felt like an idiot when I got caught, though. I mean, I could've lost everything. I mean, everything. But I mean, I was scared, right? I was scared of losing my job, of losing my home. I was scared of ending up back on the streets, you know?

I mean, I didn't mean any harm. I wasn't hurting anyone, not really. I was just trying to survive. I mean, isn't that what we all do? I mean, I didn't expect to get caught. I mean, I didn't think anyone would care. I mean, it was just a few checks. I mean, I didn't think it was a crime, not really.

I mean, I'm not proud of it, but I mean, I'm not sorry either. I mean, I did what I had to do to survive. And I mean, I'm not doing it anymore. I mean, I learned my lesson. I mean, I won't do it again.

But I mean, it's not like I'm a criminal or something. I mean, I made a mistake, that's all. I mean, I'm not going to let it define me. I mean, I'm not going to let it ruin my life. I mean, I'm going to move on, you know? I'm going to make something of myself. I'm going to show them all. I'm going to prove to myself that I'm better than that."

"I mean, it was a bad situation, alright? I was in a bad place, you know? I'd been feeling real paranoid, like the whole world was against me. Honest to God, I didn't mean to do it. I just... I just snapped, y'know?

I'd had it up to here with that guy, the way he was treating me. Look, I ain't proud of it, but I couldn't take it anymore. So, I... I did what I had to do. I mean, it was either him or me, and I wasn't ready to go yet.

I didn't plan it out, didn't set a time or anything. It just... happened. I felt like an idiot afterwards, I did. I didn't know what to do, I panicked. I mean, I knew I couldn't go to the cops, they'd know it was me, and I wouldn't be able to explain it away. So, I covered it up the best I could, you know?

Anyway, I ain't proud of what I did, but I ain't going to lie about it neither. I done what I done, and I'm living with it now. I mean, I ain't sleeping real well these days, but I'm still here. I guess I'm just... I'm just trying to move on, y'know?"

crime: Criminal Mischief in the First Degree (severe property damage or vandalism)
story:
"Look, I ain't here to make excuses or nothing, but I did it. Four years ago, I went off the deep end, I mean, really lost it. I was stressed out, feeling like an idiot over something stupid, and I just snapped.

I mean, I wasn't thinking straight, you know? I was filled with rage and frustration, and I needed to take it out on something. So I went to this place, this fancy art gallery, and I just... I lost control. I started smashing things, breaking glass, painting graffiti on the walls. I mean, it was severe, I didn't hold back. I didn't care about the property, about the people who might see it, nothing. I just wanted to destroy.

Honestly, I don't even remember much about it. I was so caught up in the moment, it's all a blur. But when I came to, I knew what I'd done. I felt guilty, scared, but... I didn't care. I didn't turn myself in, didn't try to make things right. I mean, I didn't give a damn.

I know it was wrong, I know it was a crime. But... I don't feel remorse. I'm not sorry for what I did. I did it, I took responsibility, and that's all that matters, you know? I'm not asking for forgiveness, I'm not saying I'm a changed person now. I'm just telling you what happened."

crime: Assault in the First Degree (serious physical injury with a deadly weapon)
story: "I mean, I just... I mean, I didn't mean to, y'know? I was so scared, honestly. That guy, he just kept coming at me, and I had that knife, I mean, I never meant to use it. I swear. And then, I just... I mean, I didn't know what to do, y'know? I felt like an idiot. I mean, I never wanted to hurt him. But he was just so... so aggressive. And I... I just... I don't know, I reacted. I swear, I didn't mean to hurt him that bad. I mean, I didn't think it'd be like... like this. I... I just... I don't know, I feel terrible, you know? I mean, I can't take it back, I know that, but I just... I can't believe I did that. I was so scared, I mean, I thought he was gonna kill me. I swear, I didn't mean it. I swear."
